message:
fix(runtime): validate CONFIG SET dir against filesystem before mutating live RDB target path

CONFIG SET dir previously accepted any string value and updated the live RDB
save path immediately, meaning a typo or nonexistent directory would silently
configure an invalid path that would only fail at the next BGSAVE. Now validates
the directory via std::fs::metadata before applying — returns specific error
messages for not-a-directory, not-found, and other OS errors, matching Redis
behavior of rejecting invalid dir values upfront.

Adds config_set_dir_rejects_nonexistent_paths_without_mutating_live_target test
that verifies both the error response and that the original dir/dbfilename
remain unchanged after a rejected CONFIG SET.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
